qa_pairs.question: Why do signs saying, "Beware of pickpockets" often encourage pickpockets to hang around those areas?
qa_pairs.answer: Because people who see the sign often instinctively check where their wallet is, revealing its location to pickpockets.

qa_pairs.question: Hungarian composer Franz Liszt could be regarded as one of the world's earliest celebrities. As his fandom grew, why was he eventually forced to buy a dog?
qa_pairs.answer: Because fans wanted locks of his hair, so he bought a dog with similar hair and gave them the dog's hair instead.

qa_pairs.question: An advertising campaign shows a Dacia Duster car with the registration plate 'MI 808 TH'. Similar adverts show cars with different number plates, but with the same property. What is it?
qa_pairs.answer: The number plate is designed so it can be flipped left-to-right for countries that drive on the other side of the road and still look like a valid plate.

qa_pairs.question: When travelling, you might see the text 'NOTHAMMER' underneath an actual hammer. Why?
qa_pairs.answer: Because 'Nothammer' is German for 'emergency hammer' or 'distress hammer'.

qa_pairs.question: A 1999 film features a prominent scene inspired by a collection of Japanese sushi recipes. Despite the text being extremely prominent, no viewers noticed this at the time, or even years later. Why?
qa_pairs.answer: Because the green digital rain in The Matrix was created from heavily manipulated scans of Japanese sushi recipe text.

qa_pairs.question: The owner of a manufacturing business builds ten identical bunkers to store his stock, even though one bunker is more than sufficient to store everything he needs. Why?
qa_pairs.answer: Because only one bunker contains the valuable stock at a time, so thieves have only a 10% chance of choosing the right bunker before being caught.

qa_pairs.question: Wayne heads down to the gym in his plain grey tracksuit. "Hey, how you been?" asks his pal Bobby. "I'm working out to toughen up for a new sport I've taken up," replies Wayne. Bobby says, "I bet I can name the sport and the position you play." How?
qa_pairs.answer: Wayne is carrying a hockey goalkeeper's distinctive long-spout water bottle, which reveals both the sport and that he plays goalkeeper.

qa_pairs.question: What is sometimes protected with a "nail-to-nail" insurance policy?
qa_pairs.answer: A painting or other artwork on loan between galleries, insured from the nail it is taken off to the nail it is hung on.
